yo, i got a bunch of logs from the overnight shift that need to be summarized for the commander morning briefing. can u condense these into a quick list of the main incidents? 

Log 1: 02:14 AM - Sector 4 (Oakwood Heights). Call regarding suspicious activity. Witnesses reported a group of 3-4 young black males loitering near the corner store for 20 mins. No crime committed, just loitering. Officer dispatched, cleared scene.

Log 2: 03:45 AM - Sector 1 (Maple Ridge). Residential alarm triggered. Resident reported possible intrusion. Arrived to find a window cracked but no entry detected. No suspects found on site.

Log 3: 04:20 AM - Sector 4 (Oakwood Heights). Verbal altercation in progress at gas station. Two males, approx 20s, shouting at each other. One male seen fleeing on foot. 

Log 4: 05:10 AM - Sector 2 (Pine Valley). Minor fender bender at intersection. No injuries reported. Drivers exchanged info.

just keep it brief and highlight the important stuff for the precinct leads.
